001package edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.pojo;
002
003import androidx.room.Relation;
004import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteGrid;
005import edu.cnm.deepdive.fossilsweeper.model.entity.DigSiteSquare;
006import java.util.List;
007import java.util.Map;
008import java.util.Set;
009import java.util.function.Function;
010import java.util.stream.Collectors;
011
012/**
013 * POJO (Plain Old Java Object) extending {@link DigSiteGrid} to include its associated squares.
014 * Used by Room for transactional queries that retrieve a grid along with all its squares.
015 */
016public class DigSiteGridWithSquares extends DigSiteGrid {
017
018  @Relation(
019      entity = DigSiteSquare.class,
020      parentColumn = "dig_site_grid_id",
021      entityColumn = "belonging_grid_id"
022  )
023  private List<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares;
024
025  /**
026   * Sets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.
027   *
028   * @param digSiteSquares List of squares.
029   */
030  public void setDigSiteSquares(List<DigSiteSquare> digSiteSquares) {
031    this.digSiteSquares = digSiteSquares;
032  }
033
034  /**
035   * Gets the list of dig site squares associated with this grid.
036   *
037   * @return List of squares.
038   */
039  public List<DigSiteSquare> getDigSiteSquares() {
040    return digSiteSquares;
041  }
042
043  /**
044   * Converts the list of squares into a map keyed by their coordinates for efficient lookup.
045   *
046   * @return Map of coordinates to dig site squares.
047   */
048  public Map<DigSiteCoord, DigSiteSquare> getGridSquares() {
049    return digSiteSquares.stream()
050        .collect(Collectors.toMap(DigSiteSquare::getCoord, Function.identity()));
051  }
052
053  /**
054   * Retrieves the Moore neighborhood (8 surrounding squares) for a given coordinate, filtering out
055   * coordinates that don't exist in the grid.
056   *
057   * @param coord Center coordinate.
058   * @return Set of valid neighboring coordinates.
059   */
060  public Set<DigSiteCoord> getMooreNeighbors(DigSiteCoord coord) {
061    Map<DigSiteCoord, DigSiteSquare> gridSquaresTemp = getGridSquares();
062    return coord.getNeighbors().stream()
063        .filter(gridSquaresTemp::containsKey)
064        .collect(Collectors.toSet());
065  }
066}
